entries.text: Gamification HTML email template created and sent to Mike (data/gamification-email.html). Weekly scoreboard design with dark theme, leaderboard, progress bars, badges, and point values.

Email sequencing rules codified in data/email-sequencing-rules.md. No hard cap on emails from miked@rylem.com; 15/day limit is LinkedIn only. A/B testing framework established for testing subject lines, length, and CTAs.
Sent 7 Batch 3 emails: Rippling, Toast, Ramp, Wiz, Figma, Scale AI, Databricks (2nd contact). All follow-up steps loaded into dashboard.

Intent signal system activated. Competitor reverse engineering found PACCAR (125 roles), Funko (21), Tinuiti (48), Costco active hiring. Also identified Bellevue as 'AI corridor' with OpenAI office expansion.
Sent 10 Batch 1 cold emails: Statsig, Temporal, Databricks, Carta, DoorDash, OpenAI, Anthropic, ClickHouse, Samsara, Vanta. All from miked@rylem.com with verified email patterns.
Sent 8 diversity follow-up emails (RE: subject) to Salesforce, Boeing (x2), Starbucks, OMWBE, Fortive, Google, Amazon.
Sent 5 sequence engine cold emails to Nintex, Tyler Tech, Cvent, Pushpay, Included Health.
Diversity supplier outreach sequence created. 7 steps over 30 days. Hala Hashim (Salesforce) connected on LinkedIn - warmest diversity lead.

OUTREACH RULE: Never mention diversity-certified unless contact is supplier diversity person. Hiring managers, VPs HR, TA directors don't care. Lead with speed, quality, results. Diversity angle ONLY for diversity contacts.
Engage email alias (contractor communications via CEIPAL) is off-limits. Never ask about it, never use for outreach. Hands off.
